nonAuthority: This triage report is review evidence only.
It is not SpecPM registry acceptance.
It does not publish registry metadata.
It does not create a SpecPM pull request.
It does not treat AI output as canonical SpecPackage, BoundarySpec, relation, or registry truth.

productVerdict.summary: Proceed to P33-T6 only for serena.core, transmission.core, and specpm.core. Keep mcpm.system and specgraph.system deferred until package identity drift and warning-bearing AI draft evidence are resolved or explicitly approved.

triageFindings.reason: The AI draft proposal completed without selected members, relations, or excluded packages, but deterministic single-package candidates and enrichment evidence are usable.
triageFindings.recommendedAction: Proceed with selected handoff review while treating the empty AI draft subject list as non-blocking single-package model noise.

triageFindings.reason: The AI draft warning is limited to an unknown exclusion plus no proposal subjects for a single-package candidate with passing deterministic preflight and completed enrichment.
triageFindings.recommendedAction: Proceed with selected handoff review and ignore the unknown exclusion fragment unless author review identifies a real package boundary issue.

triageFindings.reason: The AI draft selected mcpm.system with selected_member_role_unknown, model_evidence_path_unsupported, and excluded_package_also_selected diagnostics.
triageFindings.recommendedAction: Regenerate or manually review the AI draft evidence before selected handoff.

triageFindings.reason: The source manifest package id hint differs from the generated reviewable candidate id.
triageFindings.recommendedAction: Resolve package id policy, update the manifest hint, regenerate the candidate, or record explicit maintainer approval for the generated id before selected handoff.

triagePolicy.blocked: Required local input is missing or a hard gate failed.
triagePolicy.candidate_layer_review_required: Valid starter package can proceed to author or maintainer review without becoming accepted registry truth.
triagePolicy.needs_regeneration: Producer output should be regenerated, corrected, or explicitly approved before selected handoff.
triagePolicy.not_for_intake: Useful calibration evidence that should not be handed to SpecPM.

triagedCandidates.reason: Deterministic preflight passed, author-ready status is present, enrichment completed, and the empty AI draft subject list is non-blocking for a single-package candidate.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Author or maintainer semantic review remains required.
Ignore the empty AI draft subject list during selected handoff review.

triagedCandidates.reason: Deterministic preflight passed, author-ready status is present, enrichment completed, and the empty AI draft subject list is non-blocking for a single-package candidate.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Author or maintainer semantic review remains required.
Ignore the empty AI draft subject list during selected handoff review.

triagedCandidates.reason: The generated id differs from the manifest hint and the AI draft evidence contains warning-level role, evidence path, and exclusion diagnostics.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Resolve mcpm.core versus mcpm.system package identity.
Regenerate or manually review AI draft evidence.

triagedCandidates.reason: The generated id differs from the manifest hint, so selected handoff should wait for a package identity decision.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Resolve specgraph.core versus specgraph.system package identity.

triagedCandidates.reason: Deterministic preflight passed, author-ready status is present, enrichment completed, and the AI draft warning is bounded to an unknown exclusion plus no proposal subjects for a single-package candidate.
requiredBeforeHandoff: Author or maintainer semantic review remains required.
Ignore the unknown exclusion fragment unless review identifies a real package boundary issue.
